summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phishing Eval UI backend APIs and frontend functionality. Backend APIs working 100% (7/7 tests passed). Frontend authentication, dashboard, analytics panel, and takedowns history working correctly. Verdicts persist and takedown workflow functional.

design_issues.issue: Shows 'No pending takedowns' message correctly - this is expected behavior when no jobs meet takedown criteria

passed_tests: Backend: Health check API working (200 OK)
Backend: Authentication with session token successful
Backend: GET /api/prod/jobs returns job data with human_verdict_s2 field
Backend: POST /api/prod/verdict/{job_id} saves S2 verdicts to eval_verdicts collection
Backend: POST /api/prod/takedown/{job_id} creates takedown records successfully
Backend: GET /api/prod/takedowns returns takedown history (2 records found)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with authentication via session cookie
Frontend: Header shows pending review count badge (186 needs human review)
Frontend: Jobs table displays 20 job rows with proper styling
Frontend: Analytics panel toggles and shows three sections (Daily S2, Accuracy, Takedown Queue)
Frontend: Takedowns panel loads and shows 2 takedown records with proper formatting
Frontend: S2 verdict dropdowns present and functional
Frontend: Taken-down jobs display X icons and correct styling
Frontend: CONFIRMED_MALICIOUS jobs with 'correct' verdict properly identified for takedown eligibility
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (major functionality working)
